meaning: n.回车场,转变,转向,(经济,营业等的)突然好转
examples: The agency should reduce turnaround time by 11 percent.
The company has been enjoying a turnaround in recent months.
I have personally never done such a complete turnaround in my opinion of a person.
Thanks to its quick turnaround speeds, the technology also enables scientists to test multiple designs at once.
This is why the turnaround artist became such a central figure in 1980s business.
